title: New Twist in Sunjay Kapur Estate Inheritance Battle: Fight Shifts from Disputed Will to RK Family Trust
description: In their notice, Samaira and Kiaan, children of Karisma Kapoor, who are also beneficiaries of the RK Family Trust, have raised serious concerns about their status and the functioning of the trust. In her reply, Priya Sachdev Kapur accused them of siding with Rani Kapur in the ongoing family dispute
